response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with current hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) directly matching the role. Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin-adjacent JVM exposure, Python implied, DLang, C/C++), demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), and proven ability to ship end-to-end features across web, mobile, and embedded. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin experience, but the core stack alignment and AI-agent work make this a strong interview candidate.
strengths: Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Deep full-stack delivery history with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS at scale (Optilyz pricing, RIDE)
Demonstrated engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus open-source maintenance
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the primary stack required by the role
Kotlin experience not evidenced; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms, mobile orchestration ~2016-2018)
Recent backend depth leans on MongoDB; less evidence of PostgreSQL or other relational DB work
